sections.paragraph:
ἔριφος, ου, ὁ (s. prec. entry; Hom.+) kid, he-goat. Pl. w. πρόβατα prob. simply goats (cp. ἄρνας κ. ἐρίφους POxy 244, 10 [23 a.d.]; Molpis: 590 Fgm. 2c [in Athen. 4, 141e] ἄρνες, ἔριφοι; Longus 3, 33, 2; EpArist 146) Mt 25:32; GJs 18:3 (not pap).—Kid Lk 15:29 (as a roast: Alcaeus 44 Diehl2; Maximus Tyr. 30, 5a).—B. 166. DELG.

prec. prec. = preceding

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

prob. prob. = probable, probably

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

POxy POxy = Oxyrhynchus Papyri—List 4

Molpis Molpis , II–I b.c.—List 5

Fgm. Fgm. = fragment, fragmentary

Athen Athen , III a.d.—List 5

Longus Longus , II ?a.d.—List 5

EpArist EpArist = Epistle of Aristeas, II b.c.—List 5

GJs GJs = Gospel of James (Protevangelium Jacobi), II a.d.—List 1

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

Alcaeus Alcaeus , lyric poet, VII–VI b.c.—List 5

Diehl Diehl , ed., s. AnthLG—List 5

Maximus Tyr Maximus Tyr , II a.d.—List 5

  1. B. = CDBuck, A Dictionary of Selected Synonyms—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 392
